instituteInfo.name: Apex Academy
instituteInfo.description: Apex Academy is a premier coaching institute dedicated to helping students achieve their academic goals through expert guidance, proven strategies, and a nurturing environment.
instituteInfo.mission: To empower every student with quality education, personalized mentoring, and the tools they need to excel in competitive examinations and beyond.
instituteInfo.vision: To be the most trusted name in academic coaching, producing not just toppers but well-rounded individuals ready for the challenges of the modern world.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We set the highest standards in teaching and learning.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Honesty and transparency in everything we do.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Continuously evolving our methods to match modern needs.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.description: Quality education accessible to every deserving student.

timeline.event: Apex Academy founded with 3 faculty members and 50 students in Pune.
Expanded to Mumbai with a second branch. First batch produces 10 IIT selections.
Launched online learning portal, reaching students across Maharashtra.
Opened 5 new branches across Western India. Student count crossed 5,000.
Introduced NEET coaching division. Ranked among Top 10 coaching institutes in India.
Transitioned to hybrid learning model during pandemic. Zero disruption to students.
15,000+ alumni network. 98% success rate in competitive examinations.

courses.title: JEE Foundation
courses.subtitle: Class 9 & 10
courses.description: Build a rock-solid foundation in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics to prepare for JEE Main & Advanced.
courses.eligibility: Students in Class 9 or 10 with 60%+ in Science and Math.

courses.title: JEE Main & Advanced
courses.subtitle: Class 11 & 12
courses.description: Comprehensive JEE preparation with an emphasis on conceptual clarity and problem-solving speed.
courses.eligibility: Students appearing in Class 11 or 12 Board Examinations.

courses.title: NEET UG Preparation
courses.subtitle: Class 11 & 12
courses.description: Focused NEET coaching covering Biology, Physics, and Chemistry with NCERT mastery.
courses.eligibility: Students in Class 11 or 12 aspiring for MBBS/BDS admissions.

courses.title: CBSE Board Excellence
courses.subtitle: Class 10 & 12
courses.description: Score 95%+ in CBSE Board exams with our structured and comprehensive curriculum.
courses.eligibility: Students in Class 10 or 12 under CBSE Board.

courses.title: Olympiad Training
courses.subtitle: Class 6 to 10
courses.description: Prepare for NSO, IMO, and other national Olympiads with advanced problem sets.
courses.eligibility: Students in Class 6–10 with strong aptitude for Science or Math.

courses.title: SAT / ACT Prep
courses.subtitle: Grade 10 to 12
courses.description: Expert coaching for SAT and ACT exams to help students get into top US universities.
courses.eligibility: Students in Grade 10–12 looking to apply to international universities.

processSteps.title: Fill Enquiry Form
processSteps.description: Submit your details online or visit our nearest branch to express your interest.

processSteps.title: Appear for Diagnostic Test
processSteps.description: Take a free diagnostic test to assess your current level and recommended batch.

processSteps.title: Counselling Session
processSteps.description: Meet our academic counsellors who will guide you on the best course and batch.

processSteps.title: Document Submission
processSteps.description: Submit required documents: previous report card, ID proof, address proof.

processSteps.title: Fee Payment
processSteps.description: Complete fee payment online or at the branch counter via multiple payment options.

processSteps.title: Welcome & Orientation
processSteps.description: Attend the orientation session, receive study materials, and meet your mentors.

eligibility: Minimum 60% marks in the previous year's examination
Must have studied Science and Mathematics as core subjects
Age should be between 14–18 years for JEE/NEET programs
Applicants must pass the Apex Diagnostic Test
Submission of all required documents within 7 days of registration

faculty.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
faculty.subject: Mathematics
faculty.bio: Dr. Sharma is a gold-medallist from IIT Bombay with a passion for making complex Mathematics intuitive and approachable.

testimonials.name: Suresh Pillai

testimonials.name: Tanya Bose
testimonials.quote: Coming from a non-English medium background, I was intimidated by SAT. But Kavita ma'am made it so approachable. I couldn't have done it without Apex.

blogPosts.title: How to Crack JEE Advanced in Your First Attempt
blogPosts.author: Mr. Arjun Mehta
blogPosts.excerpt: The journey from JEE Main to JEE Advanced is one of the toughest academic challenges in India. Here's a battle-tested strategy from our expert faculty.

blogPosts.title: NEET 2026: Complete Syllabus Analysis and Preparation Guide
blogPosts.author: Dr. Ramesh Patel
blogPosts.excerpt: NEET 2026 brings some changes to the syllabus. Dr. Patel breaks down every subject, chapter by chapter, with a weightage analysis.

blogPosts.title: 5 Common Mistakes Students Make During Board Exam Preparation
blogPosts.author: Ms. Kavita Nair
blogPosts.excerpt: From poor time management to ignoring NCERT — here are the five most common mistakes that cost students marks in board exams.

blogPosts.title: Understanding Organic Chemistry: A Beginner's Roadmap
blogPosts.author: Ms. Sunita Iyer
blogPosts.excerpt: Organic Chemistry doesn't have to be scary. Sunita ma'am shares a beginner-friendly roadmap to mastering mechanisms and reactions.

blogPosts.title: Olympiad vs JEE: How Early Preparation Gives You an Edge
blogPosts.author: Mr. Vivek Joshi
blogPosts.excerpt: Starting Olympiad training in Class 8 or 9 can give students a massive conceptual advantage when they appear for JEE later. Here's why.

blogPosts.title: How to Score 95%+ in CBSE Class 12 Maths
blogPosts.author: Dr. Priya Sharma
blogPosts.excerpt: Class 12 Maths can be the difference between a good college and a great one. Dr. Sharma shares her chapter-by-chapter scoring strategy.

faqs.question: When do admissions open for the next batch?
faqs.answer: Admissions are open twice a year — in April for the Summer Batch and in June for the Academic Year Batch. Visit our Admissions page for exact dates and deadlines.

faqs.question: What is the batch size for each course?
faqs.answer: We maintain small, focused batches of 20–30 students for JEE/NEET courses and a maximum of 20 for Olympiad programs, ensuring personalized attention for every student.

faqs.question: Is online coaching available?
faqs.answer: Yes! Apex Academy offers a hybrid model. You can attend classes at our physical centres or access recorded sessions and live online classes through our learning portal.

faqs.question: Are instalment options available for fee payment?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a flexible instalment plan — 50% at the time of admission and the remaining 50% within 90 days. Contact our admissions desk for details.

faqs.question: How are doubt-clearing sessions conducted?
faqs.answer: Dedicated doubt-clearing sessions are held every day from 5 PM to 7 PM at every branch. Students can also submit doubts online through our portal for responses within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Do you provide hostel or accommodation facilities?
faqs.answer: We have tie-ups with verified PG accommodations near our major branches in Pune and Mumbai. Contact our admissions office for a recommended list.

faqs.question: What study materials are provided?
faqs.answer: All enrolled students receive a complete printed study material package including theory booklets, exercise sheets, and formula cards. Digital access is also provided.

faqs.question: Is there a scholarship program?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer merit-based scholarships based on the Apex Diagnostic Test. Top performers can get up to 100% fee waiver. Visit our Admissions page for details.

faqs.question: Can parents track their child's progress?
faqs.answer: Yes. Parents have access to a dedicated portal showing attendance, test performance, and overall progress reports. We also conduct monthly PTMs (Parent-Teacher Meetings).

faqs.question: How do I apply from a city where you don't have a branch?
faqs.answer: Our online program is available pan-India. You can enrol for fully online courses, access all study materials digitally, and attend live classes from anywhere.
